research_question: Does causal Binance spot order flow add stable calibrated predictive skill for post-latency BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT perpetual transaction-price direction and magnitude beyond the same shallow model using perpetual flow alone?

research_basis.title: Price discovery in bitcoin spot and futures markets
adapted_elements: separate spot and futures market roles
research_basis.non_equivalence: The paper studies 20 spot and 26 futures markets and reports market-level price discovery. Round 72 studies only Binance spot and USD-M perpetual flow for BTC, ETH, and SOL and must establish its own predictive evidence.

research_basis.title: The Role of Binance in Bitcoin Volatility Transmission
adapted_elements: traditional-market-hours state interaction as a later exogenous question
research_basis.non_equivalence: Volatility transmission is not directional return predictability or executable profit.

research_basis.title: Exploring Microstructural Dynamics in Cryptocurrency Limit Order Books: Better Inputs Matter More Than Stacking Another Hidden Layer
research_basis.non_equivalence: Round 72 uses aggregate trades rather than a reconstructed limit order book.

research_basis.title: The Quarter-Hour Effect: Periodic Algorithmic Trading and Return Predictability in Cryptocurrency Futures
adapted_elements: precommitted causal one-minute, five-minute, and fifteen-minute clock-phase features
research_basis.non_equivalence: Clock phase is a feature hypothesis, not evidence that the reported effect reproduces in this corpus or at these horizons.

source_contract.selection_rule: For each complete six-stream calendar month choose the UTC day with minimum SHA-256 of seed NUL month NUL day.

source_semantics.aggregate_trade_definition: one archive row aggregates executions belonging to one taker order at one price
source_semantics.spot_timestamp_units: milliseconds before 2025-01-01 and microseconds from 2025-01-01 onward, normalized by integer floor to milliseconds
source_semantics.aggressor_sign: is_buyer_maker false means buyer-initiated and true means seller-initiated
source_semantics.best_match: preserved for spot quality audit and never used as a fabricated futures field

ingestion_contract.network_retry: bounded exponential backoff with heartbeat and resumable verified manifests
ingestion_contract.database_write: atomic replacement of a day only after both markets for all three symbols pass verification
ingestion_contract.crash_recovery: orphan rows cannot become current and are reconciled before resume

one_second_contract.bucket: floor exchange transaction time to one second
one_second_contract.within_second_order: exchange transaction time then aggregate trade ID
stored_fields_per_market: open high low close transaction price
aggressive buy and sell quote volume
sum of squared aggregate-trade quote notional
one_second_contract.empty_second_price: causal forward carry only after a prior observed trade in the same UTC day

feature_contract.availability: all features use only completed seconds at or before the anchor
perpetual_only: signed quote flow and taker imbalance
mean and maximum aggregate-order quote notional
causal changes versus the immediately preceding equal window
spot_perpetual: log perpetual-to-spot transaction-price basis and causal changes
relative quote volume and order intensity
causal spot-flow and perpetual-flow lag interactions at 1, 5, 15, and 30 seconds
cross_asset_optional: causal BTC ETH SOL return and signed-flow means
BTC leader features for ETH and SOL
ETH and SOL peer features for BTC
clock_phase: second within one-minute sine and cosine
second within five-minute sine and cosine
second within fifteen-minute sine and cosine
feature_contract.large_flow_feature_meaning: auditable aggregate-order notional and concentration proxy only
feature_contract.normalization: training-fold robust median and interquartile range for linear controls; none for trees
feature_contract.nonfinite_policy: fatal in research and abstain in any future live adapter

target_contract.decision_availability: the anchor second is complete before inference begins
target_contract.entry_reference: perpetual one-second transaction VWAP in the exact delayed-entry second
target_contract.exit_reference: perpetual one-second transaction VWAP in the exact delayed-entry-plus-horizon second
target_contract.continuous_target: 10000 times log exit VWAP over entry VWAP
target_contract.direction_target: positive continuous target versus non-positive continuous target
target_contract.overlap_in_inference: UTC-day blocks preserve dependence from overlapping horizons

model_hierarchy: fixed shallow LightGBM using perpetual-only features
same fixed shallow LightGBM using spot-perpetual features
same fixed shallow LightGBM using optional cross-asset features
model_contract.binary_calibration: single temperature fitted on tuning months and retained only when tuning log loss improves
model_contract.continuous_calibration: single affine slope fitted on tuning months without intercept and retained only when tuning MSE improves
model_contract.compute_backend: OpenCL on a capability-tested GPU when explicitly selected, otherwise capability-tested auto fallback to CPU
model_contract.reason: The feature-layer hypothesis must beat the simple fixed control before architecture capacity is increased.

evaluation_contract.primary_feature_comparison: spot_perpetual versus perpetual_only with identical model and split
evaluation_contract.optional_feature_comparison: cross_asset versus spot_perpetual with identical model and split
evaluation_contract.inference: paired UTC-day blocked sign permutation for loss differences and UTC-day block bootstrap for metric lower bounds
evaluation_contract.multiple_testing: Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate across all primary symbol-horizon-head comparisons

stopping_rule.if_primary_gate_passes: Open the three-month sampled terminal holdout with the same frozen artifacts and gate. Only a second pass may authorize full common-history one-second ingestion and a separately frozen exact-BBO after-cost economic replay.
stopping_rule.if_primary_gate_fails: Reject this spot-perpetual directional feature family. Do not open the terminal holdout, download the remaining roughly 180 GB common corpus, run PnL optimization, add leverage, or add a larger model without materially new exogenous evidence.
stopping_rule.if_cross_asset_optional_gate_fails: Retain the spot-perpetual result without the cross-asset layer; optional failure cannot invalidate a primary pass or be hidden.

later_economic_replay_requirements: exact point-in-time bid and ask rather than aggregate-trade VWAP
account-specific maker and taker fees queried at run time
observed feed decision submission acknowledgement and fill latency distributions
queue and partial-fill uncertainty for passive orders
symbol-specific spread depth impact and capacity
funding only for perpetual positions and at actual dynamic funding times
outage reconnect snapshot reconciliation and observation cooldown
walk-forward after-cost net expectancy lower bound above zero
bounded drawdown expected shortfall concentration and no liquidation
no leverage promotion until unlevered edge passes
limitations: One sampled day per month is a resource-bounded viability panel, not the final full-history result.
Aggregate trades have transaction timestamps but no local receive time, bid, ask, queue position, cancellation flow, or executable fill.
A directionally predictive transaction-price model can still be untradeable after spread, fees, latency, impact, and adverse selection.
Binance spot and perpetual crypto have no formal daily close; UTC clock phase is periodic context, not a market session boundary.
Listed ETF and CME sessions require separate real timestamped exogenous data and are not fabricated in this corpus.
Large aggregate-order notional is not proof of identity, institution, manipulation, or informed trading.
A successful predictive screen is not evidence of profitability, AI uplift, or safe leverage.
